description:
Do you blindly follow what your bank tells you when your home loan is about to get disbursed....It may so happen that the home loan insurance that your bank insists you to buys comes with its own T&C...Find out with Dhiraj what exactly does it means

If you need further guidance on your home loan planning then do not hesitate to reach us at 9322330732..Share your details and expect a call back

maine apne frnd ka loan karwate samay 7 lakh rupees bacha liye...

comments.text:
Sharing my experience with this:

I have taken a home loan of 15 lac for 15 years tenure at 8.80 interest yesterday by SBI india.
I denied for any insurance with this loan.

The person called the insurance agent and told the same.
The agent/employee tried to convince me to have the home loan insurance ( SBI Life - RiNn Raksha )

I denied him explaining that I have already a term insurance from PNB MetLife with 1Cr cover which will cover this home loan remaining amount as well if required in unwanted condition.
He still didn't get convinced with this. He constantly tried to convice me with different tactics. Like 1Cr is good for family but why do they use some amount of that for this home loan. Its premium is low, so, you should definitly opt for it. So, with this your family can take care of the home loan separately. I agreed after this as he wasn't ready to understand what I am saying him thinking that home loan shouldn't be cancelled or the relation shouldn't go wrong with this thing.

The one time premium for the RiNn Raksha plan is Rs 15,646 which covers the loan amount 15 lac.
He created loan of this as well even after I told him for single deduction of this.

The EMI is now Rs 157.00/Mo, duration 180 months, Interest rate is 8.80 ( same what is there on home loan ).

My PNB MetLife premium is Rs 815/Mo with one rider and 1Cr cover.

I may consider to cancel it within grace period as suggested in this video or may pay the premium in single instead of wasting money on interest on this small amount.

Please like this post to highlight it for more visiblity.

comments.text:
Generally home loan insurance cancel nahin hoti hai.(But still u should enquire this and confirm with the insurance company)
To understand this that why home loan insurance doesn't gets cancelled ,you need to understand, what is home loan insurance.
Home loan insurance is insurance on your life, whose sum assured reduces over it's tenure. So if on the date of signing up insurance is for 50 L, next year it will reduce it to say 47 L and so on.
Thus even if you repay the loan or prepay the loan and reduce the loan amount, sum assured schedule does not change.
Hence even if you change the loan provider, your home loan insurance is valid but it's sum assured will not follow new loan schedule.
